body:
Documentation is complete and consistent. All 5 new sample files (`agentAzureFunction`, `agentCodeInterpreterWithFiles`, `agentWebSearchCustomSearch`, `agentWebSearchPreview`, `responseBasicWithoutAIProjectClient`) are properly added to both TypeScript and JavaScript README tables with descriptions that accurately match their `@summary` JSDoc tags; link definitions are correct and point to files that exist in the PR. Both `sample.env` files now include all environment variables required by the new samples (`STORAGE_INPUT_QUEUE_NAME`, `STORAGE_OUTPUT_QUEUE_NAME`, `STORAGE_QUEUE_SERVICE_ENDPOINT`, `BING_CUSTOM_SEARCH_PROJECT_CONNECTION_ID`, `BING_CUSTOM_SEARCH_INSTANCE_NAME`). The removal of `samples-dev/memories/memoryAdvanced.ts` leaves no dangling README references. The three medium-severity findings from a prior review run on this PR are fully resolved.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"scribe","pr":37915,"summary":"clean","findings":[]}
```

</details>
